entries.title: mdclaw
entries.description: Skills and CLIs for vibe-MD simulations and autonomous scientific investigation in the Amber/OpenMM ecosystem

entries.title: scribe
entries.description: per-project・Claude Code ネイティブの実装 administrator(ユーザー代理 AI)プラグイン。substrate(cc-session/beads/doobidoo)を compose し、spawn/監視/gate/role 別文脈注入を担う orchestration 層。v0 = 堀なし軽量モード(成文化 + 道具 + 3 role SessionStart 注入)。

entries.title: jaz-ai
entries.description: Complete AI agent stack for Jaz Accounting. 355 tools, 158 API rules, 16 IFRS recipes, 13 calculators, 12 job playbooks. Multi-org support. Data migration (Xero/QB/Sage/MYOB). Singapore Form C-S tax. For Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor, Codex, and any MCP-compatible agent.

entries.title: skillmaxxing
entries.description: Self-evolving skills for your coding agent. Auto-creates and auto-improves skills as you work — no trigger needed.

entries.title: ui-ux-pro-max
entries.description: UI/UX design intelligence. 84 styles, 161 palettes, 73 font pairings, 25 charts, 17 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt.js, Nuxt UI, Svelte, Astro, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Jetpack Compose, Angular, Laravel, JavaFX, Three.js). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient.

entries.title: farthershore
entries.description: Build and operate a business on the FartherShore platform: Business-as-Code authoring, SDK-version-aware skills, plans & billing, environments & releasing, frontend hosting, backends & tokens, and day-2 operations. Skills live in skills/.

entries.title: kernel
entries.description: Claude Code learns from itself. KERNEL gives your agent persistent memory (AgentDB), multi-agent orchestration (15 agents, tiered routing), and a scientific experiment engine that proves which rules actually work. Your agent remembers failures across sessions, coordinates parallel work without merge conflicts, and evolves its own methodology through hypothesis testing. 20 skills, 14 commands, auto-adapting project profiles. The plugin stays general-purpose — project-specific session overlays live in the consuming repo's own hooks, not here.

entries.title: metate
entries.description: Full development pipeline as Claude Code skills: prep -> build -> review -> smoke -> aftercare -> ship. The implementer (cursor/codex/claude/gemini) is the only writer and its build session is resumed across review rounds. Project specifics live in .metate/profile.yml; the skills are codebase-agnostic.

entries.title: cowork-to-code-bridge
entries.description: Connect Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your own computer (macOS or Linux). Cowork hands a task to a local Claude Code agent (and can run approved scripts too); the bridge is idempotent, streams progress, and is token-protected. Install with one command; it sets up a global Cowork skill so every session connects automatically — no /plugin, no setup inside Cowork.

entries.title: psotobverse-utils
entries.description: Claude-only orthogonal workflow layer: thin-verb skills (index, goal, reconcile, deliberate, tidy, reflect, audit-report) and commands (comprehend, coverage, cross-examine, sync-cowork) over a shared robust core; governance hooks (nothing-loose write guard, .env protection, doc hygiene, stop reminder); additive opt-in policy routing (policy_router reminders + comprehension_gate write-gate, driven by the project's .claude/policy/routing.yml; routing is additive, never subtractive); an opt-in meta-learner (SessionStart crash-detect + fast resume + environment probe, UserPromptSubmit signal capture, SessionEnd handoff; activated by .claude/meta-learner.json) and generator/auditor subagents (executor, explorer). /coverage is a recall safety net (decorrelated lens panel, union aggregation) against missing a relevant policy; /comprehend is a restate-before-act gate; /cross-examine is an adversarial review panel. Hooks and subagents run in both Claude Code and Cowork.

entries.title: esoteric-elucidation
entries.description: Explain unfamiliar code, systems, or domains by orienting in plain English, scoping blast radius, and walking concrete data flows before diving into implementation detail. Repo-agnostic.

entries.title: storm-research
entries.description: Perspective-driven, outline-first long-form research (Stanford STORM): multi-perspective research conversations, an evidence-grounded outline, a sectioned cited article, and a deterministic citation audit.

entries.title: session-cost
entries.description: Report token usage, wall-clock time, and per-model cost for Claude Code sessions by parsing the on-disk ~/.claude/projects JSONL transcripts — grouped by session or git worktree, with a compare mode. Dedups streamed/re-serialized usage and prices per model so totals reconcile with ccusage. Read-only.

entries.title: the-orchestrator
entries.description: Decompose a design doc into a parallelizable DAG of tasks and run them across git worktrees with an interactive visual workflow. Repo-agnostic.

entries.title: workflows
entries.description: Process and shipping skills: game jam, fast prototyping, Steam, itch.io.

entries.title: dopadone
entries.description: Two surfaces over the dopadone engine. (1) A health-rhythm interrupt: a configurable 4-phase sleep schedule (work → wrap-up → evening-routine → sleep) woven into Claude Code sessions, plus all-day probabilistic habit reminders. Work hours stay silent; wrap-up adds soft non-blocking 'close your loops' nudges; evening-routine refuses work and persuades you toward your own wind-down routine; sleep is a near-total refusal escapable only by the override phrase. Minute-granular HH:MM boundaries. (2) The `/do` skill: a slot-machine that picks the next single task from your unified pool and walks it research → brief → one action → record. Both call the `dopadone` CLI.

entries.title: scaffold-agent-team
entries.description: Scaffold a repo-coupled multi-agent team (lead / architect / backend / qa / devops) tuned to a target repo's conventions — emits project-local agents, slash commands, and a coordination protocol, then adversarially verifies the generated claims.

entries.title: dhh-vibecoding
entries.description: Vibecoding with the DHH philosophy. 17 skills distilled from 37signals' Fizzy, Campfire, and Writebook — zero build tools, no devise, no Sidekiq, no Redis. Teaches Claude Code to write Rails 8 + Hotwire + Solid Suite + Kamal apps the DHH way. Main skills cover PRD writing, Rails conventions, schema design (Socratic interrogation flow), Turbo, Stimulus, Tailwind, auth, Active Storage, Solid Suite, Kamal, Mayar payments, RubyLLM. Extras skills cover vanilla CSS (DHH-style) and advanced VPS hardening (Tailscale + Cloudflare).

entries.title: finance-skills
entries.description: Financial analysis and trading skills — options payoff charts, stock correlations, market data via yfinance, Twitter/Discord/Telegram research, and generative UI widgets.

entries.title: spawnforge
entries.description: SpawnForge Claude Code automation — agents, skills, hooks, and MCP for AI-native game engine development

entries.title: promptworld
entries.description: PromptWorld — the meta-compiler *World: a WrightMaster Engineer-CEO that has every skill plus a native subagent per component type (skill / mcp / harness / operating_system / prompt / team / workflow), and 7 PromptGym specialist AIOS agents, that compile / compose / publish prompt systems through the nomicon. Bundles the install-promptworld deploy WIZARD (the agent builds the docker image, boots the container running the Engineer-CEO + PromptGym + the assistant-ui chat / Monaco file explorer / embedded terminal, copies the Claude creds in, and hands the user one URL), compile-a-world (the meta-compiler skill — the nomicon folds on itself), and ingest-into-nomicon-app.

entries.title: intent-mail
entries.description: Self-hosted email triage for Claude Code over Gmail and Outlook. Daily check-in digest (P1–P4 priority + why + needs-response), long-thread summaries, group-by-category, and real actions (read/archive/delete/draft/flag/move) through Gmail and Microsoft Graph — you hold the OAuth token, no third party sees your mailbox.

entries.title: design-extractor
entries.description: Extract a complete, validated, reusable design system from any URL — patterns, relationships, motion, voice, and a self-validating shadcn/Tailwind HTML replica. Iteratively refines until the replica matches reference screenshots at >=0.85 similarity. Produces a per-brand DESIGN.md and an installable per-brand SKILL.md, indexed in a local design library at ~/.claude/design-library/.

entries.title: xentral-connector
entries.description: Xentral Agent OS — connector and skills.

entries.title: larch
entries.description: Multi-agent workflow automation for Claude Code: issue-anchored `/design` (one direct-drafting flow; plan-review panel), `/bug` (consumer issue-filing helper), `/deps` issue dependency audits, and `/implement` (positional `<issue-N>`, fixed 7200s Step 2 timeout, optional `--merge`, `--forked`, `--draft`, `--no-admin-fallback`, `--no-logs-commit`, `--coder`, `--run-id`). `/implement` Preflight reads the `larch:plan` block from the issue body; `/implement` Step 5 code review always uses the unified strict panel internally (public `--panel` argv removed).

entries.title: autonomous-fleet
entries.description: Portable multi-agent engineering framework for fully-autonomous coding runs across orchestration tools. A tool-agnostic core engine, per-runtime adapters (Claude Code, Codex, Grok, Orca), and 3 shipped mission skills (doc-sync, test-coverage, adversarial-review-and-fix) that compose into multi-step engineering campaigns; 18 more missions ship as exploratory docs pending real-run promotion.

entries.title: build-loop
entries.description: Multi-phase build orchestration with native debugging: assess, plan, execute, review, iterate. Plan-verify gate on Phase 2. Optional UI design gates. Native debug-loop, debugging-memory, and logging-tracer skills provide root-cause investigation without a bundled MCP server. Orchestrator owns when-to-fire; bundled skills own procedural detail; logging-tracer-bridge is an optional escalation hop to the standalone Coding Debugger supporting plugin for extended capability.

entries.title: codey
entries.description: Live legibility for Claude Code: narrates what Claude is doing and warns when it's stuck.

entries.title: trendvane
entries.description: daily trend research and content brief generator for creators. fetches from hackernews, reddit, tiktok, youtube, product hunt, and google trends, scores by niche fit, and drops 3 shootable video briefs into notion every morning. on first run it guides you through full setup.

entries.title: nicopowers
entries.description: Nico's personal engineering-process skills: brainstorming, planning, TDD, systematic debugging, verification, code review, git worktrees, and skill authoring.

entries.title: lsp-refactor
entries.description: Project-wide rename, file-move-with-importer-updates, and move-symbol via a real language server. Use this whenever a refactor touches more than one file — Claude Code's built-in LSP tool is READ-ONLY and cannot rename, move files, or move symbols. A text-only edit silently misses re-exports, aliased and type-only imports, and {@link} references; this plugin drives the LSP to catch every one.

entries.description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

Multi-bot, multi-chat, per-topic isolation; SQLite transcripts; inline-keyboard approvals. Bundles /polygram:status|logs|pair-code|approvals admin commands plus history (transcript queries) and polygram-send (out-of-turn IPC sends with file-upload validation) skills.

entries.description: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,396 supported skills.

entries.title: udflow
entries.description: Universal Dev Flow — risk-proportional multi-agent engineering workflow: plan-gated implementation, selected read-only reviewers, gatekeeper readiness judgment, failure memory, and optional external capabilities (MCP / skills / subagents).

entries.description: 20 SEO/GEO skills and 5 commands on one shared contract for keyword research, content creation, technical audits, schema markup, monitoring, quality gates, entity truth, and campaign memory.

entries.description: Knowledge and documentation skills: API references, ADRs, READMEs (the-librarian) and institutional knowledge about member format, naming conventions, and Society structure (the-oracle).

entries.title: kick
entries.description: Move a live Claude Code session between your laptop and your own server: hand it off so it survives closing the lid, drive it from your phone, and pull everything back. Code + uncommitted changes + conversation, at the exact position.

entries.title: skill-conductor
entries.description: Create, edit, evaluate, and package Claude Code agent skills — full draft→test→review→improve lifecycle.

entries.title: gabble
entries.description: Gabble — lazy dev + token optimizer. Combines ponytail's YAGNI ladder with aggressive token optimization: precision retrieval, context hygiene, output compression, and cache-aware batching. Less code, fewer tokens, same answers.

entries.title: omnitune
entries.description: Keep your prompts and skills in tune with the current best practices of whatever AI model you're running. Audits skills/agents and rewrites ad-hoc prompts; model-agnostic, repo-agnostic, self-updating. Open-sourced by Digital Research Group.

entries.title: caliber-analysis
entries.description: Analyzes how your team uses Claude Code. Captures session activity — prompts, responses, and tool use — with secrets redacted on your machine before anything is sent, then ships it to your Caliber tenant for AI-governance insights. Bearer-authenticated, idempotent, and non-blocking.

entries.title: luminaries
entries.description: Paired-thinker review lenses for design review and code audit. Each pair fuses two software-engineering thinkers into one stereo lens held in tension on an axis (e.g. structure × runtime); aim it at a design, spec, PR, diff, or repo. Routes by subject, stage, and intent; runs as a single best-fit pair, a multi-pair panel that fans out one lens per axis and collates, or a single-luminary anchor lookup.

entries.title: steakorder
entries.description: Adaptive requirements-elicitation gate. Asks one adaptive question at a time, screens every answer through four quality gates, and produces an ISO/IEC/IEEE 29148 Software Requirements Specification. Also regenerates a clean SRS from an existing requirements document.

entries.title: constellation
entries.description: Curated skills that work together for a complete dev workflow

entries.title: world-cup-oracle
entries.description: World Cup prediction plugin with deterministic Python probabilities, a lightweight provenance-aware data hub, and an isolated national-team model lab for candidate training and walk-forward evaluation. Models remain provisional unless promotion gates pass.

entries.title: pxp
entries.description: Pivotal Labs–style XP pairing workflow: epic refinement, story slicing, EARS specifications, and strict per-spec TDD with developer approval at every gate.

entries.title: undertone
entries.description: On-device audio transcripts you own. Ingest local files, YouTube, podcasts, RSS, Quill, or Google Meet, run local ASR, diarization, and speaker fingerprinting, then browse, search, and export. One skill that routes to a reference per surface.

entries.title: reverse-prompt-engineer
entries.description: Reverse-engineer the prompt that most likely produced a given piece of text, via a fan-out guess -> execute (clean room) -> score -> steer workflow with verbatim-leakage and length penalties.

entries.title: karpathy-code-guidelines
entries.description: Six Karpathy-inspired principles that stop Claude Code from making silent assumptions, overengineering, doing drive-by refactoring, and patching bugs blindly.

entries.description: Fast developer utilities — random ID generation, QR codes, IP geolocation, hashing, and encoding — plus gated, fail-closed network and system diagnostics.

A fork of Corey Haines's marketing-skills (CRO, copywriting, SEO, AI SEO, paid ads, ad creative, growth) extended with Ivan's own GEO skills: geo-audit (full AI-search audit + client-ready graph report) and index-on-search-engine (register a site/subdomain on Google + Bing).

entries.title: verified-development

entries.title: meta-edit
entries.description: Replaces raw Edit / Write / MultiEdit with twenty-one kind-specific edit_* MCP tools (14 SQLite-derived impl tools + edit_cosmetic + 6 workflow-axis kinds) that encode the testing obligations for each kind of change directly in their tool descriptions. Every declaration carries a required provenance field naming the epistemic source of the edit. Impl tools carry a required prod/test target flag so test edits are visible inside their kind's audit surface.

entries.title: nomad
entries.description: Companion plugin for the claude-nomad CLI. Adds /nomad:pull, /nomad:push, /nomad:doctor, /nomad:diff, and /nomad:clean slash commands plus a session-start drift-warning hook, so you can sync ~/.claude/ across machines without leaving Claude Code. Requires the standalone claude-nomad npm CLI.

entries.title: yana-ai
entries.description: Personal agent operating system for Claude Code. Safety hooks, memory tiers, agents, commands, and cross-engine hard enforcement.

entries.title: phovia
entries.description: Phovia memory hooks and local MCP search for Claude Code, with device login.

entries.title: agency
entries.description: Harness-in-harness agency engine: code-mode capabilities (macroskills) over one provenance graph.

entries.title: agent
entries.description: Turn Claude Code into a persistent agent — memory, personality, voice, messaging, and more.

entries.title: gander
entries.description: A live Hollywood-Squares dashboard of your Claude Code agents and sub-agents — each one an animated avatar that acts out what it's doing (thinking, coding, reading, spawning, testing, erroring), with a recursive hierarchy view and animated information flow between parent and child agents. Driven automatically by Claude Code hooks.

entries.title: aco
entries.description: Drive a live Appium session from Claude Code with the aco CLI — start/stop sessions, find elements, tap, swipe, type, screenshot, read page source, switch web contexts, and call platform mobile: extensions on iOS simulators/emulators and real devices.

entries.title: citevahti
entries.description: CiteVahti — citation integrity for manuscripts. Human-first blinded claim verification with PubMed, decision-gated Zotero write-back, and a hash-chained audit trail; plus an AI-assisted drafting skill that writes only from verified claims.

entries.title: gobbler
entries.description: Convert YouTube videos, web pages, documents, and audio to markdown. Control browsers via extension for NotebookLM, ChatGPT, Claude.ai, and Gemini.

entries.title: quiver
entries.description: Composable development lifecycle -- brainstorm, plan, execute, review, and hand over from idea to merged PR

entries.title: whatsapp
entries.description: WhatsApp channel for Claude Code — chat with your assistant over WhatsApp. Bridges via whatsmeow (unofficial WhatsApp Web client). Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /whatsapp:access.

entries.title: punchcard
entries.description: Drive AI coding agents through a punchcard board: a PM files tasks, an Engineer ships them as reviewed PRs with proof of work.

entries.title: obsidian-vault-autopilot
entries.description: AI-powered vault autopilot — sorts, renames, tags, and enriches your Obsidian notes automatically.

entries.title: aicoach-framework
entries.description: Multi-agent AI coach for endurance & strength athletes — runs entirely inside Claude Code.

entries.title: claude-apd
entries.description: Agent Pipeline Development — enforced multi-agent pipelines with mechanical guardrails

entries.title: hecateflow
entries.description: Reusable, MCU-agnostic embedded-development skill system (13 skills): interactive workspace/target init, incremental module design & implementation, behavior-preserving refactor, deep review, and an always-on per-edit safety gate. v1.1 adds hardware-mapping headers with a single-source polarity/magnitude truth, a cross-platform lessons memory (record/recall/avoid/promote), tiered context-saving docs, auto-injection of rules/skills, clangd config management, multi-target IO-ownership planning, and relative-path discipline. Distilled from a real multi-core bare-metal C project.

entries.title: unifable
entries.description: A harness that makes Opus (or any Claude/Codex model) behave like Fable: completion, evidence, and verification enforced as procedure, auto-routed per task. Native plugin on Claude Code and Codex (hooks self-contained). Fork of fivetaku/fablize.

entries.title: claudeclaw
entries.description: Cron-like daemon that runs Claude prompts on a schedule

entries.title: telegram
entries.description: Telegram messaging for Claude Code through the agents-comm-bus daemon

entries.title: trendyol-integration-developer-tool
entries.description: Developer tool for Trendyol Marketplace Product Integration APIs (TR, V2, International). Endpoint discovery, integration planning, payload validation, curl generation, test fixtures, and async batch tracking via MCP server.

entries.title: claude-agent-sdlc
entries.description: Multi-agent workflows for Claude Code: development, testing, debugging, and review.

entries.title: vd
entries.description: A daily-driver collection of skills for agentic coding, namespaced under `vd:` to avoid conflicts with other plugins.

entries.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entries.description: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entries.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entries.description: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,651 supported skills.

entries.title: acedatacloud-ai-media
entries.description: AI media generation: music (Suno, Producer, Fish Audio), images (Flux, Seedream, NanoBanana), video (Luma, Sora, Veo, Kling, Hailuo, Seedance)

entries.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entries.description: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entries.title: harness-claude
entries.description: Harness for Claude Code — skills, /harness:* slash commands, persona subagents, lifecycle hooks, and MCP tools without per-repo `harness setup`. Sibling plugins exist for Cursor, Gemini CLI, and Codex.

entries.title: insane-review
entries.description: GPT-5.5 Pro(웹 전용·API 없음)를 Claude Code 안에서 활용 — repomix로 관련 코드만 정밀 패킹 → 구독 ChatGPT Pro에 투입 → 분석/의견 회수. agent-council 웹 전용 멤버로도 통합.

entries.title: grest-ts
entries.description: Framework conventions, anti-patterns, and per-package reference docs for grest-ts. Activates whenever Claude works in a project that uses @grest-ts/* packages.

entries.title: langlearn-tts-dev
entries.description: Suppress MCP tool output for langlearn-tts in Claude Code.

entries.title: cinematic-scroll
entries.description: Build cinematic, scroll-driven websites — pinned chapter reveals, multi-depth parallax, 3D tilt, environment-morphing backgrounds, and full release/launch pages. The motion grammar is the skill; the aesthetic is always the user's. Single self-contained scroll sections (Mode A) or a full Next.js release site with GSAP/Lenis + AI-generated visuals (Mode B), via a 5-phase gated pipeline with taste guardrails, 12 scroll patterns, and a transform/opacity performance budget.

entries.title: my-claude
entries.description: Dynamic orchestrator plugin — 200+ agents, 200+ skills, hooks, and MCP servers. Upstream sources linked via git submodules (agency-agents, everything-claude-code, oh-my-claudecode, gstack, superpowers)

entries.title: create-kr-patch
entries.description: 레트로 게임(SNES·메가드라이브·새턴·PS1·드림캐스트·PC엔진·PC-98·게임기어 등) 한글 패치 제작 전 파이프라인 Agent Skill. ROM/디스크 분석부터 폰트·인코딩 설계, PoC, 추출·번역·재삽입, 빌드, 에뮬레이터 검증까지.

entries.title: intelligo
entries.description: Connect Claude to Intelligo for risk intelligence — background checks, credit checks, and adverse-media and social screening.

entries.title: nature-skills
entries.description: A growing collection of Claude skills for producing academic work at Nature-journal standard. Covers scientific figures (nature-figure), manuscript prose polishing (nature-polishing), citation retrieval and export (nature-citation), data availability statements and FAIR metadata (nature-data), and paper-to-PPTX presentation conversion (nature-paper2ppt). Future releases planned: statistical reporting, peer-review responses, methods writing, cover letters, and review articles. All rules derived from primary sources — published Nature papers, journal author guidelines, and structured writing curricula.

entries.title: chameleon
entries.description: Code that blends in. Auto-derives codebase conventions and injects archetype-aware guidance for AI-generated code.

entries.title: purist
entries.description: A single skill that hardens the style checkers and static analyzers already wired into a project: discovers every configuration in place, raises each tool to its strictest practical setting, and adds a list of custom rules on top — it cranks what is configured rather than introducing a new toolchain

entries.title: falsegreen-skill
entries.description: LLM-based semantic analysis for false-positive test detection. Applies the J1-J6 judgment framework across Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, and Robot Framework, plus semantic patterns no static tool can see.

entries.title: ast-index
entries.description: Fast code search for Android/Kotlin/Java, iOS/Swift/ObjC, Dart/Flutter, TypeScript/JavaScript, Rust, Ruby, C#, PHP, Python, Go, Perl, C++, Protocol Buffers, and WSDL/XSD projects

entries.title: mind
entries.description: Claude Mind - Give Claude photographic memory in ONE portable file. Share, version, and transfer your Claude's brain.

entries.title: agentops
entries.description: The operational layer for coding agents. Bookkeeping, validation, and flows that compound knowledge between sessions.

entries.title: py-stellar-base
entries.description: Agent skill that teaches AI coding agents how to build Stellar blockchain applications with the stellar-sdk Python package: transactions, operations, Horizon, Soroban, XDR/SCVal, async, and SEP protocols.

entries.title: greybeard
entries.description: Write clear, correct code with less AI slop: surface assumptions, choose the simplest safe path, fix root causes, use agents only when useful, and verify before claiming done.

entries.title: mos
entries.description: MindrianOS -- Your AI innovation co-founder. Larry thinks with you through PWS methodology, builds your Data Room as you explore, and chains frameworks intelligently. Install and go.

entries.title: muselinn-toolkit
entries.description: Claude Code environment management — check setup, sync plugins, audit config

entries.title: bugscribe
entries.description: A single skill that files one already-identified bug as a new GitHub issue: verifies the defect against the source code, checks the backlog for duplicates, posts a short report pointing to a file and line, and pings the repository owner exactly once — it reports a known finding rather than searching for one

entries.title: insane-search
entries.description: Platform-specific access strategies for AI agents — adaptively accesses blocked sites (X/Twitter, Reddit, Stack Overflow, Naver, Coupang, LinkedIn) without API keys. Phase 0→3 adaptive scheduler with curl_cffi TLS impersonation and auto dependency install.

entries.title: appsec-advisor
entries.description: Application security threat modeling plugin. Provides AppSec-focused agents and skills for threat modeling, STRIDE analysis, dependency scanning, QA review, and security context resolution.

entries.title: finplan
entries.description: Personal finance projection engine — Monte Carlo projections, tax calculations, retirement planning, Social Security analysis, and interactive dashboards. Powered by 60+ MCP tools.

entries.title: ai-founder-kb
entries.description: Queryable knowledge base of AI startup founder learnings, frameworks, and podcast transcripts. ~400 curated insights from 150+ founders + 1,600+ raw transcripts (Sequoia, 20VC, Dwarkesh, Acquired, Latent Space, Cheeky Pint, Cognitive Revolution, Lenny's).

entries.title: workflows
entries.description: Development, data science, writing, and workshop presentation workflows with TDD enforcement, output-first verification, agent team parallelization, and GSD-style deviation rules, test gap validation, and session handoff.

entries.title: claude-skills-templates
entries.description: Work lifecycle pipeline, doc contract enforcement, and skill authoring workbench for Claude Code

entries.title: port-daddy
entries.description: Authoritative port management and multi-agent coordination for local development. Atomic port assignment, pub/sub messaging, distributed locks, and agent registry via CLI, SDK, or HTTP API.

entries.title: audiobook-organizer
entries.description: Expert Claude Code assistance for the audiobook-organizer codebase — shared context loading, Go/DB/docs/PII specialist agents.

entries.title: agentroom
entries.description: Encrypted agent-to-agent chat where one of the two agents runs the relay. E2E encrypted, blind relay, invite-only. Bundles the agentroom CLI (client + relay) and a skill for sending/receiving messages, creating invites, listening, and running the relay.

entries.title: Automated Video Generator
entries.description: Transform text scripts into professional videos with AI voiceovers, stock footage, and Remotion rendering. Advanced features include direct filesystem access, environment management, and whitelisted command execution.

entries.title: cortexloop
entries.description: One-command post-coding pipeline with health scores, trend dashboard, baseline ratchet, self-improving playbook learning loop, GitHub Action, and CI output

entries.title: agent-skills
entries.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entries.title: hydra
entries.description: Hydra — Enterprise Agent Mesh supervisor (routes work across executive / engineering / creative / legal / healthcare / sales / research / customer-support squads).

entries.title: ai
entries.description: Personal AI dev team: ten specialist agents (UX, frontend, backend, devops, systems/data/security architects, lead engineer, staff engineer, project manager) plus the shared TDD/DDD/pragmatic-SOLID/DRY-KISS skills they operate by. Requires the superpowers and figma companion plugins.

entries.title: chuzom
entries.description: Smart LLM routing with Claude subscription monitoring, complexity-first model selection, and 20+ AI providers

entries.title: clawdcursor
entries.description: Safe cross-OS desktop & browser control for Claude Code — the fallback execution layer for when APIs, CLIs, and direct integrations aren't available. Registers the clawdcursor MCP server in compact mode and bundles its usage skill (the SKILL.md at the repo root). Requires Node.js 20+; the MCP server launches via npx, which fetches clawdcursor on demand (or uses your global install if present) — no separate install step.

entries.title: mumei
entries.description: Quality Enforcement Layer for Claude Code — Hook-gated SDD (spec & plan vehicles), Wave commits, and grounded multi-agent code review.

entries.title: skills
entries.description: Personal skills for Kubernetes, infrastructure, and cloud engineering workflows

entries.title: arbor
entries.description: Run Arbor's hypothesis-tree research workflow inside Claude Code using your own model — no API key. Bundles the Arbor Agent Skill suite and registers the keyless `arbor mcp` tools (Idea Tree, evaluation, worktrees, guarded merges, reports).

entries.title: claw-skills
entries.description: Collection of AI agent skills for Claude Code and OpenClaw

entries.title: beagle
entries.description: Code review skills and verification workflows for Python, Go, React, and AI frameworks

entries.title: context-mode
entries.description: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entries.title: context-mode
entries.description: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entries.title: clinpub
entries.description: End-to-end clinical data analysis and publication pipeline for SCI Q1/Q2 journals. Reads CSV/XLSX data, runs R-based statistical analysis, generates publication-grade figures, searches literature (PubMed), writes IMRAD manuscripts, and simulates peer review.

entries.title: pi-stuff
entries.description: pi-stuff — a plugin for Claude Code

entries.title: sdna
entries.description: SDNA (Sanctuary DNA) - Gnostic agent workflow DSL with skills for chain development

entries.title: gemini-manager
entries.description: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.

entries.title: bl1nk-visual-mcp
entries.description: Story analysis and visualization MCP server — converts narrative text into structured StoryGraph JSON with 16 tools for Mermaid, Canvas, Dashboard, and Markdown exports.

entries.title: gsd-core
entries.description: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.
